doctor.subtitle: Board-certified Interventional Cardiologist with 18+ years dedicated to advanced cardiac care, preventive cardiology, and life-saving interventional procedures.

about.heading: About Dr. Deepti Arora
paragraphs: Dr. Deepti Arora is one of India's leading Interventional Cardiologists, renowned for her expertise in complex coronary interventions, structural heart disease management, and advanced cardiac imaging. With over 18 years of clinical experience, she has successfully performed more than 5,000 cardiac procedures.

Trained at AIIMS New Delhi and further fellowship-trained at Cleveland Clinic, USA, Dr. Arora combines world-class expertise with deep compassion for her patients. She is a pioneer in bringing minimally invasive cardiac procedures to Mumbai.

Her holistic approach to cardiac care — integrating cutting-edge technology with patient-centered treatment plans — has earned her recognition as one of India's Top 10 Cardiologists by Healthcare Excellence Awards 2023.

services.heading: Our Specialized Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive cardiac care with state-of-the-art technology

list.title: Coronary Angioplasty
list.description: Minimally invasive procedure to open blocked coronary arteries and restore blood flow to the heart muscle.

list.title: Echocardiography
list.description: Advanced ultrasound imaging of the heart structure and function for accurate diagnosis.

list.title: Cardiac CT & MRI
list.description: High-resolution imaging for detailed assessment of coronary arteries and cardiac anatomy.

list.title: Preventive Cardiology
list.description: Personalized risk assessment and lifestyle modification programs to prevent heart disease.

list.title: Pacemaker Implantation
list.description: Implantation of permanent and temporary pacemakers for heart rhythm management.

list.title: Heart Failure Management
list.description: Comprehensive management of acute and chronic heart failure with advanced therapies.

list.name: S*** V***a
list.text: I have seen significant improvements in my sugar levels and overall health. The doctors and staff are knowledgeable, empathetic, and professional. Highly recommend Healthwise Chandigarh for effective and personalised sugar treatment!

list.name: M** E** H***e
list.text: I highly recommend Dr. Deepti's diabetes clinic, which is well-equipped with in-house testing devices. Dr. Deepti is not only excellent in her treatment approach but also offers practical dietary advice. It's the best diabetes management program I've experienced.

list.name: A** M*
list.text: I had tried multiple diets before, but nothing lasted. This approach felt practical, and I finally started losing weight steadily. The plan was simple to follow, and the results felt sustainable.

list.name: D** S***
list.text: I had almost given up on losing weight. But this didn't feel like another diet. It was a simple approach I could stick to—and the weight started coming down gradually.
